title: Gundamma Katha
writer: Aluri Chakrapani, Narasa Raju D.V., Pingali Nagendra Rao
actors: Suryakantham, N.T. Rama Rao, Akkineni Nageswara Rao
plot: Gundamma, a rich widow, has one goal - to get her spoilt daughter married to a rich boy. She, however, treats her step daughter like a maid. Gundamma does not care about the step daughter's life or marriage. How two brothers, who ...
